changes: Replaced verbose 494-line skill with concise ~50-line version
Removed all interactive elements: no clarifying questions, no plan presentation, no confirmation prompts
Added exact copy-paste bash script with for-loop and case statement for file organization (handles spaces in filenames)
Simplified duplicate detection to two-step process: compute hashes then read sorted output
Used md5 -r (macOS compatible) instead of md5sum
Added explicit instruction to include ALL files sharing same hash in groups
Separated organize vs dedup instructions to prevent model from doing both when only one is asked
